revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:豪族, en:Gōzoku); add local discussion section + dated import note

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] previous contributors were [[User:en>Citation bot]], [[User:Immanuelle]], [[User:EmmaBot]], see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=G%C5%8Dzoku here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=G%C5%8Dzoku for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:42, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/94796521 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:42, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:豪族 | revid=94796521 --> == 吉備氏 ==
列挙される豪族に吉備氏が二回登場するのはミスですか？--[[特別:投稿記録/2001:CE8:125:ADB8:B1A0:997A:347B:9384|2001:CE8:125:ADB8:B1A0:997A:347B:9384]] 2023年4月15日 (土) 16:17 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:42, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
== Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1202408546 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:42, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: en:Talk:Gōzoku | revid=1202408546 --> {{oldafdfull| date = 20 November 2011 (UTC) | result = '''keep''' | page = Gōzoku }} {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Stub| {{WikiProject History|auto=yes|importance=}} {{WikiProject Japan|importance=mid|nobility=y|history=y}} }}
